title: lyonia acuminata
intro: Lyonia acuminata, also known as the fringetree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, leaves, and roots, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Lyonia acuminata include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lyonia acuminata include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from the plant's leaves, roots, and berries.
